posts.author: wellness_mom_x74
posts.text: Has anyone tried the new 'Bloom Fertility Collective' protocol? I'm 29 weeks pregnant and feeling very anxious about my doctor's advice. They say I need to keep monitoring, but this account claims it can completely replace prescribed care and avoid all hospital visits for the rest of the pregnancy. The testimonials are so convincing!
posts.explanation: This post promotes health misinformation by suggesting abandoning prescribed medical care during pregnancy, which requires specialist verification.
